
;;; NOTE: This test won't work outside the test environment because it relies on
;;;  specific atoms in a specific order in the space, and loading the default environment's
;;;  init.metta will break the assumptions in this test
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;; Even at the very beginning of the script `(get-atoms &self)`
;;; returns two atoms.  One is from the imported stdlib, and the other
;;; is corelib, which was a dependency of stdlib that has been promoted
;;; These atoms are both wrapped spaces, as is `&self`
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
  !(assertEqual 
    ( (let $x 
        (get-atoms &self) 
        (get-type $x))) 
    (superpose (((get-type &self)) ((get-type &self)))))

[

;
;; MODULE-SYSTEM.F1-IMPORTS.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.002 secs. (2.34 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqual 
    ( (let $x 
        (get-atoms &self) 
        (get-type $x))) 
    (superpose (((get-type &self)) ((get-type &self)))))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (Symbol) (Symbol)) 
      ( (Symbol) (Symbol))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5976))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqual 
          ( (let $_3862 
              (get-atoms &self) 
              (get-type $_3862))) 
          (superpose (((get-type &self)) ((get-type &self))))) $_3592) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4100) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3592 $_4128) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3334) $_4128)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5976))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqual 
          ( (let $_3862 
              (get-atoms &self) 
              (get-type $_3862))) 
          (superpose (((get-type &self)) ((get-type &self))))) $_3592) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4100) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3592 $_4128) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3334) $_4128)))))


^  Exit: (215) [system] sig_atomic(rtrace:restart_rtrace)
